headline: The team behind AEGIS
subheadline: A small, focused team building AI systems that respect human agency.

members.name: Dan (Ji Won Jeong)
members.bio: Leading the vision for trust-first AI systems. Background in economics and AI research, building AEGIS OS—the infrastructure layer that makes AI accountable.

members.name: Michael Kelly
members.bio: Bridging creative vision with technical implementation. Leading AI-assisted content creation initiatives and strategic business development.

members.name: Felicia
members.bio: Building the AEGIS brand and community presence. Focused on communicating the value of trust architecture to enterprises and organizations.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We'd rather ship one excellent system than ten mediocre ones. Every deployment reflects our commitment to trust.

values.title: Transparent
values.description: We tell you what we're doing, why, and what the tradeoffs are. No black boxes, no hidden agendas.

values.title: Pragmatic
values.description: We use what works. No technology religion—just results. If it helps you succeed, we'll use it.
